findings.design_reference: FR-020 / NFR-001 / specs/198-beta2-hardening/data-model.md:99-114 / code-implementation and test-integrity lenses
findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: stop the autonomous review/fix loop. Prior blocking finding f1 remains unresolved with no worktree-visible human deferral. The round-2 parser still accepts arbitrary [a-z-]+ iteration/task statuses, accepts noncanonical Last Completed Task text without mapping it to review evidence, and does not parse or compare the authoritative capacity/test_counts claims at all. The added tests pass but do not exercise these reported abuse paths, so they cannot establish fail-closed TrackerClaims conformance. A human must decide whether to require a complete canonical parser plus abuse tests, or record an explicit visible deferral naming the issue, approver, and carried work.
